title: Floral Enchantment
description: Decorate with new floral vines and flower bushes!
body:
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/735938861636780042?style=flat-square&logo=discord&label=Discord&color=5865F2)](https://discord.com/invite/2wMZKZ7B6E) • [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support-Ko--fi-F16061?style=flat-square&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/cozary) • [![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/Cozary/Floral-Enchantment?style=flat-square&logo=github&logoColor=white&color=364763)](https://github.com/Cozary/Floral-Enchantment/issues) • [![Crowdin](https://badges.crowdin.net/floral-enchantment/localized.svg)](https://crowdin.com/project/floral-enchantment)

## ![](https://i.imgur.com/Tmf7NUj.png) About
-----------------------------------------------------

 

Looking for a simple mod to decorate? This mod adds flower bushes with which you can obtain the vines of each flower.

Also like mossy cobblestone, you can get mossy cobblestone from each flower to decorate! As well as mossy stone bricks.

It also includes ports and largue ports to place the flowers. As well as floral baskets and flower crowns.

Flower vines are obtained from bushes.

The special Render when carrying a Large Pot is deactivated if you have the "Obfuscation" mod, due to incompatabilities.

 **![](https://i.imgur.com/Tmf7NUj.png)**__**Do you want a look?**__
